title: e-Wicker24 Natural Rectangular Wicker Basket (40 x 30 x 12 cm) with Liner, Ideal for Daily Use and Food Contact
features: It is handmade, from 100% natural and environmentally friendly materials, without any chemicals,
The approved product for food contact, which ensures the safety of your food.
Natural product, dimensions and colour may vary slightly from the image.
You can also use it for any other function according to your needs or imagination.Ideal for daily use, storage and display of breads, fruit and other products.
Can be cleaned directly with a damp cloth and machine lining at 30°C (cotton fabric).
Its natural colour adapts to all the themes of your home.
description: Product Description Hand woven wicker baskets are ideal for storing and organizing various items. They can be used as shelf boxes, magazine holders or umbrella stands. In addition, they are perfect for storing toys in the children's room or towels in the bathroom. Thanks to their flexibility, they can be used conveniently in almost any room in the house. Wicker baskets provide a natural, rustic look that fits well into different decor styles. They bring a warm and friendly atmosphere to the room. Their organic materials and handmade details add a touch of nature to the home. In addition, they harmonize with both modern and traditional decorations. Wicker baskets are renowned for their robustness and durability. They are strong and can safely store heavier items. Despite their lightness, they are resistant to wear and retain their shape for many years. This makes it a profitable investment for long-term use. Being made from natural materials. They represent a durable option for storage and organization. Unlike plastic products, they do not leave a harmful ecological footprint. In addition, they promote traditional craftsmanship and support local artisans. These baskets are lightweight and easy to carry. They can be moved easily from room to room, making them particularly practical. This makes them ideal for use in different parts of the house, whether in the living room, bedroom or even in the garden. Thanks to their lightweight design, they are also very useful when moving or refitting the living space.
